backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the letter panel uses fixed, transform-based centering so it never shifts after the envelope opens, referencing Envelope.tsx and index.css.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, styling details, and key implementation notes for the romantic envelope/letter app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, applied to all elements and the body.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title 'For My Cutee', Google Fonts imports for Cinzel, Great Vibes, Dancing Script, Playfair Display, and Poppins, and the React root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a dark radial-gradient background with a persistent StarBackground, a centered Envelope wrapping LetterContent, and a fixed gold footer attribution link.
frontend/src/components/EntryButton.tsx: Empty file with no exported component.
frontend/src/components/Envelope.tsx: Interactive envelope component that animates a flap open on click, then renders a fixed, viewport-centered letter panel with a backdrop overlay using a letterReveal animation that only affects opacity/scale to prevent positional drift.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file with no exported component.
Empty file with no exported component.
frontend/src/components/HeartCanvas.tsx: Empty file with no exported component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no exported component.
Decorative letter surface component with a wine/rose gradient background, gold border, glow shadows, corner ornament accents, bloomIn entrance animation, and a scrollable inner content area.
frontend/src/components/LetterContent.ts: Renders the romantic love letter body addressed to Priya, with a Dancing Script header, gold ornament, justified paragraphs in Playfair Display, and a cursive signature footer.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file with no exported component.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file with no exported component.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: Gold pill-shaped button labeled 'To My Priya ✉️' with a radial gradient, Cinzel font, gold glow box-shadow, and hover scale/glow effects.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Renders an animated background with 90 twinkling/drifting star particles and 10 floating heart/sparkle shapes using randomized CSS animations and inline styles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file reserved for a background music hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file reserved for a heart animation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via a React context, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through the useInternetIdentity hook and InternetIdentityProvider component.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for React Query backend hooks; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/utilities, CSS design tokens (gold, dark, envelope colors), custom font utilities, and keyframe animations for envelope flap and letter reveal effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom colors (gold, chart, semantic tokens), fonts (Cinzel, Great Vibes, Playfair, etc.), shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a Valentine's love-letter app with an envelope open animation, noting a known issue where the message panel drifts off-center after the reveal animation.
